reviews.comment:
Paré a verificar presión de los neumáticos y te cobran el aire. Insólito para un lugar de servicios.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped to check the tire pressure and they charged me for the air. Unbelievable for a service station.

reviews.comment:
Muy flojo el servicio  de comida. Se ve a simple vista. El precio alto el plato mucho q desear...
(Edición)

Vine el segundo día. Pensé les voy a dar una oportunidad. Pero las cucarachas q caminan entre los pies me confirmaron q este lugar tiene q estar cerrado.

Donde esta bromatologia de tucuman?

@ypf #ypf #full

(Translated by Google)
The food service was very poor. It's obvious at first glance. The price is high, and the food leaves much to be desired...
(Edited)

I came the second day. I thought I'd give them a chance. But the cockroaches crawling around my feet confirmed that this place needs to be closed.

Where is the food safety inspection department in Tucumán?

@ypf #ypf #full
